title: The Depths of Impel Down
description: In the Impel Down storyline, this section centers on Whitebeard, Unknown person #1, Ivankov, Unknown person #9, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3 as the scene develops across pages 1–4.
scene: This scene advances the Impel Down conflict through Whitebeard, Unknown person #1, Ivankov, Unknown person #9, Unknown person #2, focusing on the immediate stakes of the depths of impel down.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Hurry!! Just leave it close by!!

dialogue.speaker: Whitebeard
dialogue.text: How long is he going to eat...?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: He has an incredible will to live!

dialogue.speaker: Whitebeard
dialogue.text: He took Magellan's poison and survived!!!

dialogue.speaker: Whitebeard
dialogue.text: Oh, I'm not sure what you're doing.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Are you okay!? Hang in there!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: We lived!! Thanks for saving us!!!

dialogue.speaker: Whitebeard
dialogue.text: If you want to thank someone...

summary: This scene advances the Impel Down conflict through Whitebeard, Unknown person #1, Ivankov, Unknown person #9, Unknown person #2, focusing on the immediate stakes of the depths of impel down.
